user.title: ☀️ Welcome to CloudEMS v1.3
user.description:
CloudEMS is your smart energy management system for Home Assistant.

This wizard configures:
• ⚡ Phase count & current limit
• 🔌 Grid meter & phase sensors (auto-detected)
• 🌞 Solar, battery & EV charger
• 💶 Dynamic EV loading on EPEX price
• ⚖️ Phase balancing (3-phase)
• 📡 P1 smart meter connection

☕ [Buy the developer a coffee](https://buymeacoffee.com/cloudems) | 🚀 [Premium](https://cloudems.eu)

Choose your country for EPEX energy prices:

phase_config.title: ⚡ Phases & current limit
phase_config.description:
Select the grid connection that matches your installation.

**Single-phase** → typical older homes
**Three-phase** → new builds, heat pumps or three-phase solar inverters

Not sure? Check your fuse box — the number of main fuses indicates the number of phases.

phase_custom.title: ⚡ Custom current limits
phase_custom.description:
Manually enter the number of phases and the maximum current per phase.

L2 and L3 are only used for three-phase connections.

grid_sensors.title: 🔌 Grid meter sensors
grid_sensors.description:
CloudEMS automatically found **{detected} sensor(s)** based on names and units. Review the suggestions and adjust if needed.

Phase sensors are optional but enable accurate per-phase monitoring.

solar_ev.title: 🌞 Solar & EV
solar_ev.description: Connect your solar inverter, home battery and EV charger. CloudEMS auto-detects solar surplus for smart charging.

data.enable_solar_dimmer: Curtail solar at negative EPEX prices

features.title: 🚀 Smart features (v1.3.0)
features.description: Enable the new CloudEMS features that are relevant for your setup.

data.dynamic_loading: ⚡ Dynamic loading — automatically charge EV during cheap EPEX hours
data.dynamic_load_price_threshold: Cheap price threshold (EUR/kWh) — charge when price ≤ this value
data.cost_tracking_enabled: 💶 Energy cost tracking — live €/hour sensor based on EPEX price
data.phase_balance_enabled: ⚖️ Phase balancing — warning when L1/L2/L3 imbalance is detected
data.phase_balance_threshold_a: Imbalance threshold (A) — warn when difference exceeds this
data.enable_multi_inverter: 🌞 Multi-inverter PID — smart per-phase dimming with phase detection

advanced.title: 📡 P1 meter & Premium
advanced.description:
Connect your P1 smart meter for direct DSMR readings (more accurate than HA P1 integration).

Optionally enter your CloudEMS API key for cloud AI NILM and premium features.
[Subscribe at cloudems.eu]({premium_url})

inverters.title: ☀️ Inverters & strings (v1.3.0)
inverters.description:
Configure your solar inverters for auto-learning and PID control.

CloudEMS learns the **peak power** of each inverter and automatically detects **which phase** a single-phase inverter is connected to.

Skip this step if you don't need direct inverter control.

[Learn more]({docs_url})
